slides.title: BROKEN CROSSING
slides.subtitle: Iron Front — Operation Verdant
slides.body: Intel confirms enemy forces have fortified the river crossing at grid 14-15. A garrisoned farmhouse overlooks the ford. They have armour. We don't — yet.

slides.title: TERRAIN ASSESSMENT
slides.subtitle: River crossing — two approach vectors
slides.body: The ford is the only crossing point. Open ground — you'll take fire crossing it head-on. Our engineers found something else: a tunnel entrance south of the tree line. Unknown destination.

slides.title: YOUR ORDERS
slides.subtitle: Three objectives — in sequence
slides.body: Establish a defensive line on the south bank. Locate and use the tunnel to flank. Clear the farmhouse. Then hold the ford for thirty seconds against whatever they send back.

onEnter.showObjective: Advance to the defensive trench line. Dig in before pushing north.
Enemy patrol spotted. Farmhouse strongpoint controls the ford.
Engineers report a tunnel entrance nearby. Use it to flank the farmhouse.
Clear the farmhouse. Evict or destroy the enemy garrison.
Counterattack inbound. Hold the ford for 30 seconds.
